mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( member_id, order_no, total_price, delivery_fee, final_price, order_name, order_phone, receiver_name, receiver_phone, address, delivery_message, depositor_name, bank_info, order_status, payment_method, payment_status, toss_payment_key, delivery_company, tracking_no ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{orderNo}, #{totalPrice}, #{deliveryFee}, #{finalPrice}, #{orderName}, #{orderPhone}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{address}, #{deliveryMessage}, #{depositorName}, #{bankInfo}, #{orderStatus}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentStatus}, #{tossPaymentKey}, #{deliveryCompany}, #{trackingNo} )
INSERT INTO order_detail ( order_id, product_id, product_name, price, qty, total_price, image_url ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{price}, #{qty}, #{totalPrice}, #{imageUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, order_no AS orderNo, total_price AS totalPrice, delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, final_price AS finalPrice, order_name AS orderName, order_phone AS orderPhone, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, address, delivery_message AS deliveryMessage, depositor_name AS depositorName, bank_info AS bankInfo, order_status AS orderStatus, payment_method AS paymentMethod, payment_status AS paymentStatus, toss_payment_key AS tossPaymentKey, delivery_company AS deliveryCompany, tracking_no AS trackingNo, created_at AS createdAt FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, order_no AS orderNo, total_price AS totalPrice, delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, final_price AS finalPrice, order_name AS orderName, order_phone AS orderPhone, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, address, delivery_message AS deliveryMessage, depositor_name AS depositorName, bank_info AS bankInfo, order_status AS orderStatus, payment_method AS paymentMethod, payment_status AS paymentStatus, toss_payment_key AS tossPaymentKey, delivery_company AS deliveryCompany, tracking_no AS trackingNo, created_at AS createdAt FROM orders ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, member_id AS memberId, order_no AS orderNo, total_price AS totalPrice, delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, final_price AS finalPrice, order_name AS orderName, order_phone AS orderPhone, receiver_name AS receiverName, receiver_phone AS receiverPhone, address, delivery_message AS deliveryMessage, depositor_name AS depositorName, bank_info AS bankInfo, order_status AS orderStatus, payment_method AS paymentMethod, payment_status AS paymentStatus, toss_payment_key AS tossPaymentKey, delivery_company AS deliveryCompany, tracking_no AS trackingNo, created_at AS createdAt FROM orders WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'PAID', payment_status = 'PAID' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET payment_status = 'WAITING', order_status = 'ORDERED' WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET delivery_company = #{deliveryCompany}, tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, order_status = 'DELIVERY' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, price, qty, total_price AS totalPrice, image_url AS imageUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET delivery_company = NULL, tracking_no = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.product_name AS productName, p.category, p.price, p.stock_qty AS stockQty, p.image_url AS imageUrl, p.description, p.created_at AS createdAt
FROM orders o
JOIN order_detail od ON o.id = od.order_id
JOIN product p ON od.product_id = p.id
WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId}
ORDER BY p.product_name
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET order_status = 'CANCEL', payment_status = 'CANCEL', delivery_company = NULL, tracking_no = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND order_status IN ('ORDERED', 'PAID', 'READY')
